notes:
-Fixed Mod list flickering on the bottom of the list

-Fixed Logs screen tabs so switching between Activity and Error now reliably updates the visible log content

-Added Full support for importing compressed archives (ZIP/7z/RAR) by auto-extracting them and importing any BA2/ESM/ESP/STRINGS files inside

-Fixed Update screen now preserves changelog spacing/line breaks so release notes are readable

-Added Visual border/card around the Logs view to match the rest of the UI

-Adde: GitHub button on the Update screen header
